title: City of Destruction
subtitle: Awakening under a burden no home can soothe
intro: You wake before dawn with the book open in your hands and a burden on your back that no sleep can soften.
The city calls this fear, but the words on the page name it truth: judgment is coming, and your heart is not ready.
Those you love ask you to stay and be reasonable. Repentance begins when you stop pretending the house is safe because it is familiar.
spiritual_theme: Awakening, honest fear, and the first turn toward life
core_mechanic: Carry the burden through a familiar city, answer loved ones and mockers, and receive Evangelist's call to flee toward the narrow gate.
